subject: [PATCH v2 01/14] fuse: separate next request fetching from sending logic

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch separates the logic of fetching and sending the next request in the fuse kernel module, making the control flow clearer and reducing unnecessary parameter passing. The duplicated logic from fuse_uring_send() is removed, and a new function fuse_uring_get_next_fuse_req() is introduced to fetch the next request. The send operation is now handled by a separate function fuse_uring_send(). This change simplifies the code and improves maintainability.
